title: sutera floribunda
intro: Sutera floribunda, also known as the annual sweet Alyssum, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Borage family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Sutera floribunda include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Sutera floribunda can be consumed as a tea or used in infusions, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and calmness.
